protocol.name: CRRC-72 — Cross-Venue Radial Refill Compression
protocol.claim: A same-side inner-book refill that occurs simultaneously in USD-M and COIN-M while outer same-side depth withdraws and inner depth remains credible predicts a six-hour move toward the refilled side.

evidence_boundary.incidence_correction_before_outcomes: eight looser-cell scratch counts were replaced by the canonical quarter-contained t+10m scheduler replay; the selected cell and its 156-event count did not change

novelty_boundary.versus_rex: contemporaneous cross-venue depth-shell mechanics, not price-action exhaustion and reclaim
novelty_boundary.versus_oi_funding_premium_kimchi: the signal uses no OI, funding, premium, spot basis, Kimchi, FX, or DXY
novelty_boundary.versus_pdf10: same-side radial add/withdraw compression, not displayed-depth versus firmness divergence
novelty_boundary.versus_rlwc144: one contemporaneous state, not a temporal outer-to-middle-to-inner cascade
novelty_boundary.versus_cclh: flow and credibility conjunction, not persistent full-depth geometry hysteresis
novelty_boundary.versus_near_pressure: unsigned four-condition venue agreement, not a signed weighted shell-flow score
novelty_boundary.not_a_new_family_claim: multiple adjacent order-book candidates and their outcomes already exist; CRRC-72 must report outcome-blind clock overlap and later PnL correlation

universe.execution_role_of_coin_m: signal-only; no inverse-contract PnL is executed

feature_formula.bar: completed 5-minute bookDepth aggregate built from nominal 30-second snapshots

per_venue_and_side.inner_flicker: 0.25 * (log_mad_side1 + log_mad_side2 + log_step_side1 + log_step_side2); arithmetic mean, never division

feature_formula.venue_side_pass: all four inequalities pass on one venue and side
feature_formula.bid_both: UM bid pass AND CM bid pass
feature_formula.ask_both: UM ask pass AND CM ask pass

support_selection.selection_rule: among cells satisfying every support gate, lexicographically maximize q_add, then q_withdraw, then q_net, then minimize q_flicker

clock.entry_time: t+10m open; one full 5m bar after feature availability
clock.exit_time: entry open + 72 completed 5m bars = six hours
clock.scheduler: greedy non-overlap, reset flat at each UTC calendar quarter
clock.quarter_containment: signal, entry, full hold, and exit must remain in one quarter
clock.source_gap_after_entry: does not cancel a live position; only entry formation requires joint completeness

execution.cost_applied: entry and exit on 0.5x absolute USD-M notional
execution.funding_completeness: no forward fill; missing expected held settlement invalidates evaluation
execution.strict_mdd: global/pre-entry HWM; entry, exit, funding cash, hypothetical liquidation cost, and held OHLC with favorable-before-adverse ordering
execution.cagr: full declared wall-clock including warm-up and idle cash

controls_not_repair_candidates: entry and exit delayed five minutes
ten basis points per notional side

orthogonality_after_standalone_pass.compare_against: all promoted/live sleeves on one synchronized strict ledger

live_parity_contract.collector_required: live UM and CM local books recreating cumulative +/-1..5 percent depth at nominal 30-second snapshots
live_parity_contract.aggregation_required: the same 5m shell-flow and credibility transforms, UTC boundaries, joint completeness, lagged quantiles, and t+10m entry clock
live_parity_contract.parity_before_promotion: shadow collector must reproduce archive transforms within documented numeric tolerances and pass stale/gap/reconnect tests

protocol.stop_rule: Reject before outcomes if support or outcome-blind independence fails. Otherwise hash-freeze the event clock, physically isolated 2023 execution sources, and evaluator, then open 2023 exactly once. Retire without repair on the first failed frozen gate. Open 2024, 2025, and 2026 only after each preceding window completely passes. Historical success still requires live collector parity and at least 90 forward-shadow days.
